_comment: Hand-maintained corrections. Overrides ALWAYS win and survive every re-scrape. Keys are grotto names (case-insensitive, whitespace-collapsed) matching the API roster name. Keys starting with '_' are ignored. Fields: exclude (bool), town, state, lat, lng (pin a town centroid), name, contact_url, note. See README 'How overrides work'.

_example_coordinate_fix.note: EXAMPLE ONLY (key starts with _ so it is ignored). To fix a mislocated grotto, copy this under its exact name: "Some Grotto": { "lat": 35.123, "lng": -86.456, "note": "why" }

_aliases._comment: Map an API roster name -> the legacy-list name when they differ, so the grotto keeps its town/website instead of being dropped as defunct. Reviewed against the legacy list.

Pittsburgh Grotto.note: Legacy list misspells the town as 'McKeespot', which fails to geocode. Corrected to McKeesport, PA.

Gila Area Grotto.note: New grotto (in API, not legacy). Town from its caves.org description: 'meeting in Silver City'.

Colorado School of Mines Grotto.note: New grotto (in API, not legacy). Colorado School of Mines is in Golden, CO.

Grotto of the Ancients.note: New grotto (in API, not legacy). Town from its caves.org description: 'serving the 4 corners region including Cortez and Durango'.

Druid City Grotto.note: New grotto (in API, not legacy). 'The Druid City' is the established nickname for Tuscaloosa, AL.
